name: Popover
description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger element.

props.name: placement
props.description: Position of the popover relative to the trigger element.

props.name: trigger
props.description: How the popover is activated - `'click'` toggles on click, `'hover'` on mouse enter/leave.

props.name: size
props.description: Popover panel width and padding size.

props.name: open
props.description: Programmatically control visibility. Reflected to attribute.

props.name: closeOnEscape
props.description: Close the popover when the Escape key is pressed.

props.name: closeOnOutside
props.description: Close the popover when clicking outside of it.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show a close button in the header area.

props.name: showArrow
props.description: Render a small arrow pointing toward the trigger element.

props.name: offset
props.description: Distance between the popover and the trigger (0–4 Tailwind spacing units).

props.name: openDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before showing the popover on hover trigger.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Delay in ms before hiding the popover after mouse leaves (hover trigger).

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Automatically focus the first focusable element inside the popover when opened.

props.name: trapFocus
props.description: Trap keyboard focus within the popover while open.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the dialog when no visible header is provided.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Optional popover footer (only renders when provided).

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when popover closes (after exit animation).
